escalation.rationale: US fighter jet downed over Iran with missing pilot, Trump's 10-day ultimatum deadline approaching, and strikes near Iranian nuclear facility.

ticker_items: US fighter jet downed over Iran, pilot missing on day two
Trump warns Iran 'time is running out' on 10-day deadline
US-Israeli strikes reported near Bushehr nuclear facility
Iran claims responsibility for downing two US warplanes
IAEA demands 'maximum military restraint' after nuclear plant strike

eastern_europe.description: Russian daytime attacks using over 500 drones and dozens of missiles killed 14 people.
Russian strikes killed 14 people in daytime barrages on 1,500th day of war

middle_east.description: Houthis claim cluster missile attack on Ben Gurion airport in Jaffa.
Iran claims shooting down US aircraft involved in pilot rescue operation.
Projectile hits near Iran's Bushehr nuclear plant, killing one person
IDF strikes Beirut as part of ongoing Lebanon operations
Iran-backed Houthis claim barrage of ballistic missiles struck Tel Aviv
Israeli air strikes and shelling across Lebanon from Beirut to Tyre killing at least 14 people.
Strikes targeted location close to Iran's Bushehr Nuclear Power Plant.
Yemen's Houthis claim to have struck Tel Aviv with barrage of ballistic missiles.

claimed_totals.figure: ~2,076 Iranian dead, ~24 Israeli dead, ~13 US soldiers, ~27 Gulf states
2,076 dead in Iran, 24 in Israel, 13 US soldiers, 27 in Gulf states

middle_east.text: A US crew member who has been missing since Iran shot down a fighter jet has been rescued
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: Those who keep silent in the face of criminals will pay a heavy price
middle_east.speaker: Masoud Pezeshkian
middle_east.title: Iranian President

middle_east.text: Hopefully, he's looking for an off-ramp
middle_east.speaker: Pope Leo XIV
middle_east.title: Pope

middle_east.text: Hopefully, he's looking for an off-ramp
middle_east.speaker: Leo XIV
middle_east.title: Pope

observers.description: China is actively pursuing diplomatic role in Iran war with five-point plan developed with Pakistan. Beijing opposes UN proposal for military action to open Strait of Hormuz and seeks support from Gulf nations.

Britain convened virtual summit with 40 countries to explore reopening Strait of Hormuz as global oil prices climb. UK hosting diplomatic efforts to address Iranian blockade of vital Persian Gulf chokepoint.

External Affairs Minister Jaishankar calls to 'hedge, de-risk, diversify' resources amid West Asia conflict. Emphasizing building national capabilities while navigating global shocks from ongoing wars.
Volkswagen planning to convert factory to produce Iron Dome components for Israel. German conscription deadline passes as Europe faces pressure from extended Iran conflict.

financial.notes: Global oil prices climbing as Iran blocks Strait of Hormuz during ongoing war, OPEC+ agrees to symbolic output hike.

update_log.text: IAEA confirms strikes near Bushehr nuclear facility, demands maximum restraint
Search for missing US pilot enters second day after fighter jet downed over Iran
Israeli strikes across Lebanon kill at least 14 people from Beirut to Tyre
Iran claims responsibility for downing two US warplanes on day 36 of conflict
US pilot from downed F-15E fighter jet rescued after 48 hours in Iran
Projectile hits near Iran's Bushehr nuclear plant, fourth such attack during war
Russian strikes kill 14 people across Ukraine in daytime barrages
UK hosts 40-nation virtual summit to explore reopening Strait of Hormuz
Trump confirms rescue of second US pilot downed in Iran, Iran claims another aircraft shot down during rescue
Houthis claim cluster missile attack on Israel's Ben Gurion airport in coordinated regional escalation
Russia launches massive daytime attacks across Ukraine killing 14 people using over 500 drones
